task_completion.description: Open the Correlation Matrix analysis tool in JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Correlation Matrix' analysis settings panel is visible on the left side of the JASP interface.

task_completion.description: Select all five Big Five personality trait variables for analysis
task_completion.visual_evidence: The variables 'Neuroticism', 'Extraversion', 'Openness', 'Agreeableness', and 'Conscientiousness' are all present in the 'Variables' box in the analysis panel.
The 'Report significance' checkbox is checked in the analysis options, OR the resulting Pearson Correlations table in the right panel explicitly shows 'p' (p-values) for the variable pairs.

task_completion.description: Flag significant correlations in the output
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flag significant correlations' checkbox is checked in the analysis options, OR the correlation coefficients in the results table have asterisks (e.g., *, **, ***) next to them.

task_completion.description: Include a heatmap in the output
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Heatmap' checkbox is checked under the 'Plots' section in the analysis options, AND a visual heatmap plot showing the correlation matrix is visible in the results panel on the right.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual JASP application window with its distinct ribbon, analysis panels, and results pane, rather than a terminal running R/Python scripts.

integrity.description: Results are generated by the software, not mocked up
integrity.visual_evidence: The correlation table and heatmap appear natively within the right-hand JASP results pane, not in an external image viewer, text editor, or web browser.

integrity.description: The agent analyzed the actual provided dataset
integrity.visual_evidence: The variables in the analysis exactly match the Big Five traits ('Neuroticism', 'Extraversion', 'Openness', 'Agreeableness', 'Conscientiousness') without manually typed dummy data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset actually contains 500 participants, not 231 as stated in the task description. If the results table displays the sample size (N), it will show N=500. Do not penalize the agent for this discrepancy. The dataset contains exactly the five variables requested.
